# .NET Version Upgrade Progress

## Overview

Upgrading 25 projects across VisualHFT and OxyPlot repos from net8.0/net472 to net10.0. Using Bottom-Up (Dependency-First) strategy, starting from leaf libraries and working up to the main application.
**Progress**: 0/6 tasks complete <progress value="0" max="100"></progress> 0%
**Progress**: 0/6 tasks complete <progress value="0" max="100"></progress> 0%
